query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `simulations` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `shareToken` varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `productName` varchar(500),
  `brandId` int,
  `unitPrice` bigint NOT NULL,
  `costPrice` bigint,
  `grossMarginRate` decimal(5,2),
  `hasSet` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `expectedAov` bigint,
  `liverId` int NOT NULL,
  `commissionRate` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `fixedFee` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `simContractType` enum('exclusive','spot') DEFAULT 'spot',
  `streamDuration` int NOT NULL,
  `timeSlot` varchar(50),
  `dayOfWeek` varchar(20),
  `hasAd` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `adBudget` bigint,
  `estimatedGmv` bigint,
  `estimatedSalesCount` int,
  `estimatedGrossProfit` bigint,
  `estimatedLiverCost` bigint,
  `estimatedNetProfit` bigint,
  `estimatedRoi` decimal(8,2),
  `aiPrediction` json,
  `simStatus` enum('draft','shared','archived') DEFAULT 'draft',
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `simulation_feedback` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `simulationId` int NOT NULL,
  `livestreamId` int,
  `actualGmv` bigint,
  `actualSalesCount` int,
  `actualNetProfit` bigint,
  `actualRoi` decimal(8,2),
  `gmvAccuracy` decimal(5,2),
  `overallAccuracy` decimal(5,2),
  `feedbackNote` text,
  `impactFactors` json,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
